description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI and CD that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: Tests and Deploy. The Tests job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the code, runs a one-line script, starts the environment with make start-containers, and runs tests with make params=-T tests. The Deploy job depends on the Tests job, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, and uses an Ansible playbook to deploy to a server with provided SSH key and vault password.
